data.content: transitionToRetry now resolves memory manager type in-function and dispatches retry advancement through typed routing: knots -> nextKnot(expectedState), beads -> nextBeat(currentState). Added assertions in verification orchestrator test suites to verify resolveMemoryManagerType('/repo') is used for dispatch decisions. Gates in worktree: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit pass, bun run test pass (2022 total), NODE_ENV=production bun run build pass.
